hook: A mismatch does not need a villain to still be a mismatch.
body: You can respect someone and still conclude that the emotional, practical, or relational fit is weak.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

hook: Many men linger because they think leaving requires a dramatic offense rather than an honest recognition.
body: Lack of fit is sufficient information even when the person is kind and appealing in other ways.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

hook: Lack of fit is sufficient information even when the person is kind and appealing in other ways.
body: You may admire someone and still realize your pace, goals, or communication styles would make the relationship harder than it should be.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life

hook: You may admire someone and still realize your pace, goals, or communication styles would make the relationship harder than it should be.
body: Practice ending things based on fit before resentment has to do the decision-making for you.
voices: Logan Ury, The School of Life
